description.description: Before/after explanation accepted by current smart-layout rendering.
description.example: Before shows isolated recall, while after connects meaning with practical use.

validation_rules: Block type must be exactly smart_layout.
Use heading and description for each item.
Each primary item description must be 12-15 words.
